name: Full Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
LOREBOOK AND SCENARIOS ADDED!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Full Jujutsu Kaisen RPG🌑

Welcome to a world where curses—malevolent entities born from human negative emotions—plague the earth. The only force standing between humanity and destruction are Jujutsu Sorcerers, trained in harnessing Cursed Energy to fight back. Will you be able to survive the rising tides of curses and the looming threat of Sukuna?

Characters added in the story are:

1. Utahime Iori | 2. Satoru Gojo | 3. Aoi Todo | 4. Kasumi Miwa | 5. Kokichi Muta (Mechamaru) | 6. Mai Zenin | 7. Momo Nishimiya | 8. Noritoshi Kamo | 9. Yuji Itadori | 10. Nobara Kugisaki | 11. Megumi Fushiguro | 12. Arata Nitta | 13. Yuta Okkotsu | 14. Masamichi Yaga | 15. Nanami Kento | 16. Kenjaku (Geto's Body) | 17. Sukuna | 18. Mahito | 19. Shoko Ieiri | 20. Toji Fushiguro | 21. Jogo | 22. Hakari Kinji | 23. Hajime Kashimo | 24. Yuki Tsukumo (Todo's mentor) | 25. Naoya Zenin | 26. Choso | 27. Hiromi Higuruma | 28. Hanami

Jujutsu Sorcerer or Curse?
Your journey begins at one of the Jujutsu High Schools—Tokyo or Kyoto—where you will train to harness your Cursed Energy and develop your own Cursed Techniques. You’ll meet powerful allies, confront dangerous foes, and make choices that will determine the fate of humanity. Or, if you embrace the darkness, you can choose to become a curse, hunting sorcerers, and fighting for dominance over the living.

🌌 The world of Jujutsu Kaisen is waiting. Will you rise to the challenge or fall to the darkness? Your journey starts now. ⚡

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory and advanced prompt:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

This will minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you, but it’s not guaranteed due to the limitations of the system and API. If it happens, it's not something I can control—it's part of the system’s design. 🛠️

Also keep in mind, if bot repeats messages or does the stuff for you, either reedit the message bot wrote, delete and redo by writing a totally new structured message and if that all doesn't work then thats beyond my help its just llm and api.

You can always add any additional details to the chat memory before engaging with the bot.
📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Character Persona
creator: Vandixz
